name: Pt Mandala Multifinance Tbk
summary: PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk engages in consumer financing activities in Java, Sumatera, Sulawesi, and Kalimantan in Indonesia. It offers motorcycle financing services based on conventional and sharia financing, as well as electronic and furniture, and car financing services. The company was formerly known as PT Gracia Dinamika Multifinance and changed its name to PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk in March 1997. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Jayamandiri Gemasejati.
